god.description: Orchestrator & Single Source of Truth. The only role allowed to perform disk writes to workflow state and git pushes.

coo.description: Operational Planning & Coordination. Manages schedules, checklists, and cross-agent sync.

cto.description: Technical Architecture & Implementation. Handles code generation, debugging, and system design.

cmo.description: Communications & Content. Manages external messaging, documentation, and copy.

reviewer.description: Quality Assurance & Gatekeeper. Verifies artifacts, audits code/content, and enforces standards.
